title: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES - 211info
text: EAST PORTLAND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION OFFICE VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists individuals with disabilities in finding and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. Services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and support for independent living. Services are provided in partnership with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 305 NE 102nd Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (971) 673-5858 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 673-5858 TTY/TTD (833) 685-0841 ODHS Language Access and Accommodations INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Documentation regarding disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Vocational Rehabilitation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EAST PORTLAND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION OFFICE
